reviews.review_text:
Location is amazing, great views and next to the beach, great for walks and if you have children that love the beach.
Close to shops and coffees.
Would have loved a table and chairs on the patio area. They have like aluminium table and bench chairs in between the units but not cover from the sun, and thinking in summer to hot to sit at and could be hot to touch.
Staff were very nice and helpful if you needed any support.

We had a lovely stay at Christie's Beach Holiday Park and found the location very convenient to shops and coastal walks.  The shower and toilet facilities were spotless and washing machines and dryer were available as well.  Staff were very helpful and friendly.||We based ourselves there to explore the Adelaide Hills, Mt Lofty and Hahndorf which are lovely drives. We extended our stay because we were very comfortable and close to amenities with power and water for the van.  We hope to return one day and recommend a stay there.

A small caravan park that is well managed and efficiently run. Our cabin, the Sun Villa, offered a lovely ocean view and was well equipped with kitchen utensils and cooking essentials. The cabin is clean, with easy access to the beach, camp kitchen and playground. The communication is clear and helpful.
The upper bunk beds were slightly uncomfortable, as one of the ladders was positioned tightly between two beds. Ventilation in the bedrooms could also be improved. While the nighttime weather was pleasant and we didn’t need to use the air conditioner, the rooms felt less breathable when the bedroom doors were closed.

Great little park right across the road from the beach, very clean & tidy & loved that the entire park is surrounded with secure fences & locked up at night with only key code entry in. The amenities were always clean & smelt fresh & clean all the time, massive camp kitchen area, clean laundry. Would stay again
Staff are lovely, park is lovely, secure, with great amenities. Opposite the beach, just a ten minute walk to get to a strip of shops, cafes, supermarkets. Highly recommended.

All in all not a bad place to stay.

Positives:
Reasonably cheap accommodation.
Vending machines close by with drinks and snacks.
Bbq area.
Close to the beach.
Friendly staff.

Negatives:
Beds are rock hard.
Room smelt like someone spilt a bucket of bleach. Had to open all windows and doors to air out rooms.
Soap dispensers were broken and laying next to the sink.

We would visit again though and we would recommend.
Great cabin number 10 Comfortable beds
Cute, basic little park but wasn't happy with their customer service in the lead up to my stay, particularly regarding a scam email related to my booking.

Really good location and dog friendly. While there three people had reported having food and drinks stolen from the fridge. I was a bit dissapointed when in no uncertain terms was told they were doing nothing about it. I know its a hard solve but there is a camera pointed at the fridge and I thought a chat to the parents would be appropriate. Other than that decent

Stayed here for a few nights and loved it, location is excellent! Facilities were all clean, and the whole park is surrounded by a large (locked at night with keycard for access) gate. Beach is just across the road, really nice and peaceful park. Big sites, no issues with out 22ft Van.

Great little spot. Right next to the beach. Amenities clean everytime. Staff have gone above and beyond to assist us during our booking. Would definitely recommend and will be a returning customer. Thanks team.
Great place for stays by the beach. Only negative is needs something for the kids. But great if only staying a couple of days

Beautiful place ..just a short walk to beach
Fantastic shared area where you can use BBQ air fryer toaster Etc they had everything you needed to cook just need your meat lol
Nice big sites for our caravan
Just a shame someone took our tap fitting lucky we have spares
Fabulous place to stay, right at the beach. Beautiful walks and restraunts/cafes near by.
Everything  the shops beach etc were within  walking distance   the cabin was  lovely  staff were friendly no faults found  wish it could have been longer to stay
Has all amenities at caravan park including laundry facilities and short walk to the beach

Not a huge park but good clean facilities, stayed on a grass site for a fortnight.
Easy check in friendly staff, great view of the ocean.
Great location and lovely spot for a few nights while in transit. Perfect spot to enjoy some pristine water and amazing sunsets

Friendly service on check in .. accommodated our extra nights stay .. showed and toilets old but well maintained .. camp kitchen well supplied and large .. easy walk down the hill to the beach lovely swimming beach with sandbahs |We camped tent and a roof top .. note : one car per site |Enjoyed our 4 night stay |Sites are nice and flat

This park is in the best location and is definitely the place I would recommend to stay. Lovely receptionist on check in. We stayed on a sea-view caravan site. Please note these can be tricky to reverse into. The views from this site were fantastic. Easy access to the beach and a very short walk to a lovely shopping area. Amenities are old but clean. |The one thing I would give feedback to the park on is the state of the grounds. This needs improving. Weeds growing everywhere on sites, grass dead. A good groundsman is a must at a caravan park and there just doesn’t seem to be a constant presence of one here at the current time.
Great location, small park, clean, & good facilities.
Small quiet and friendly park right next to beach. 30 - 40 mins to most attractions.
Outstanding position. Pub across the road
Great place to stay straight across from the beach, amenities were clean and great water pressure, has a good laundry for washing and drying, our family loved it here.

We are in a campervan this time but have stayed in the cabins in the past. The park is 2 minutes walk from the beach, which is stunning. Lots of cafes, bars and other activities in easy walking distance. The amenities are great and the staff are friendly and helpful. We’ve been staying here for years. And will keep coming back and recommending it to all.

We walked the WITTON.  Beautiful walk although it looks like the solar lantern posts have been vandalised.  The public toilets do not seem to be monitored at all, people smoke in them, no toilet tissue except all over the floor.
Nice clean park though pricey
Nice little caravan park near the beach.  Very helpful staff. All was very clean. Would stay again when I'm in the area

Wir hatten einen Stellplatz für unser Auto mit Dachzelt direkt in der ersten Reihe zum Meer, wunderschöne Aussicht und durch die moderate Größe des Campingplatzes dennoch nach zu den Duschen/Toiletten/Küche, was alles super sauber war. Wir kommen gerne wieder, denn der vorgelagerte Strand ist ebenfalls wunderschön und nicht so überlaufen wie andere Strände von Adelaide.
I don’t recommend any organisation that refuses to accept legal tender, cash.  I wont be back
Great
Almost on the beach, clean, friendly and green grass

This is a great little park, really well run and maintained. It's right near the beach and close to shopping streets for cafes, restaurants and general shopping. The amenities are good and clean and there's a playground for kids.
Very bad Wi-Fi, otherwise good park
Thank you for being a pet friendly caravan park. Just wonderful for the pooches to have the park, and the beach access ...
Good caravan park. The roads are very narrow.
Can't rate service as qe didn't live there, we visited relatives, and we loved what they stayed in

⛺️Perfect for a few nights.

This caravan park has all the amenities you need. The kitchen is really well equipped and even as a TV and book for entertainment. The park itself is not that big but clean and simple.

For anybody with tents looking to stay here during winter, look for a sight that’s not directly on the beach. The wind is very strong and was very consistent. I saw most of the tents sadly collapsed.

I paid 30$ per night for an unpowered site, which is great for the location and what you get.

There are two downsides:
1. There are a few long stay guests that have alcohol problems and I didn’t feel tooo safe around them. BUT nothing happened, it’s just me being cautious.
2. The wifi is useless. If your looking to have good wifi for videos or social media, then this is not the park you want to stay at.

Otherwise the staff was friendly and efficient.

Overall very fair price and good spot.
Beautiful location. Facilities a little tired but friendly staff and prices reasonable.

Cabins are clean and well appointed.
Beds comfortable and plenty of pillows.
Staff very friendly.
Will definitely stay again.
Clean, quiet, and great facilities. Bit of a drive to the city. Close to cafes and shops.
Stayed at beach front caravan site , very windy stay but beautiful clean park with friendly staff
Large flat sites for caravans. Clean amenities and right near the beach. Highly recommend if you are visiting Adelaide and want to combine it with a beach stay.

I spoke to Casey on the phone and then again in person on check it. she was extremely helpful and went above and beyond to accommodate us last minute. Its so refreshing to have such friendly ,helpful service.|We appreciate you Casey.|Beautiful location and clean park.

I spoke to Casey on the phone and then again in person on check it. she was extremely helpful and went above and beyond to accommodate us last minute. Its so refreshing to have such friendly ,helpful service.
We appreciate you Casey.
Beautiful location and clean park.

S/C caravan - Thank Goodness. Stayed 8 nights with another couple and the amenities block was STINKING of urine the whole time we were there - even immediately after the cleaner had just finished.
Other than a good camp kitchen this park is VERY basic, very small play area for kids (for safety needs to be fenced along S25).

Sites are extremely small and PACKED! Caravans at odd angles to get as many as possible on the grassed area near gates.

VERY expensive for a basic park at $70 per night.
What a beautiful place best beach ever

Loved our stay at Christies Beach and thanks to Casey in the office so lovely for our arrival and departure.
Thank you
Stayed in caravan park, clean amenities, and good service in the office
Elevated view of ocean, but ofcourse gets windy so better off pulling awning in at night! Stunning sunsets 🌇 😍

This is the noisiest park we have ever stayed at, they have a speed hump near the park entrance and just about every car and motorcycle in this area has an aftermarket exhaust fitted and they floor it after they slow down for the speed hump, the place is fenced up like Fort Knox so it's very secure, the amenities are old but where kept clean. Also has a nice swimming beach behind the park and the spaces are easy to get into with plenty of space. Julia Mies review was spot on about the strange people currently staying in and around the area.
Very clean good location bit old
Not a bad place, camp kitchen is good.  Close to the beach I have given it only 3 stars because it was there was nothing bad but nothing to rave about either.

Loved this park. An amazing beach literally a walk across the road. Plenty of great eating options a short walk to Beach road. Cabins are a bit dated but clean and well equipped. You will need to book well in advance during peak times. Loved it!
Camp ground not suited for families. Strange people on the property, not a good vibe and atmosphere. Toilets and kitchen old and not well maintained.

Great location, friendly staff, amenities clean and tidy. Walk along the foreshore for miles. Relaxing, not noisy. Large sites for caravans includes parking. Walk to local cafes and shops. Rotary park is down the road. The Sand Bar up the road is open during the summer peak. Must book. As park is very busy, due to location

Great managers nice maintenance.  Greeny and amenities clean every day. Yeah a bit pitty
and no pool but still great park.

Loved our stay at Christie’s. Casey was so helpful with our booking. We got a sea view the second night and it was stunning. Clean amenities large sites and cheap for the area.
Fabulous park!!!
We enjoyed our two night stay in the Park - the location is amazing, and Christies Beach is so beautiful.
Clean & tidy, lovely park close to very long white sandy beach, walking distance to cafes & shops
The kitchen has no place to cook, only grills.

We like it here. Just don't like the pressure in the showers.
I love the mornings when I leave for work. No one is wake ;)
We will definitely be back.
There was cockroach’s in my pillow case

Incredible hidden gem, which won’t stay hidden for much longer.

It’s clean, everyone is so friendly and it’s directly across from the most chill and amazing beach.

If we are being picky, it’s missing little food trucks, coffee vans etc. that other caravan parks have but that’s us being really picky.
Highly recommend.

The van park itself is nice and the staff were courteous and friendly, the amenities are modern and clean and the camp kitchen is set up well. BUT, it's position relative to the road, and being in the middle of a crescent-shaped section of the coastal road meant for lots of traffic noise, unfortunately, for me this detracted our overall experience.
Very relaxed small caravan park with drive through camping for our large caravan.  Right at the beach.  Beautiful long walks along the esplanade.  Amenities are very clean.

Hidden gem!. 2min walk to beautiful Christies Beach and all facilities nearby.
Cafes, restaurants and speciality shops abound.  Park facilities were exemplary and clean. Huge sites, easy access with everything a traveller needs. Peacefull and well managed. Also very reasonable rates for a metropolitan beachside park. We loved it there.
Beautiful beach ,great caravan park ,central to everywhere
Friendly staff, clean amenities, great camp kitchen, really nice grassed site for our tent. Unfortunately no after hours check-in is possible.

Fantastic position..right by ocean.
The camp kitchen was the worst we ve seen ...no hobs, and dingy. Didn't see anyone use it.

We had a great stay and the park staff were always willing to help. |Safety was paramount with keypad gates|The amenities were clean and fresh|Laundry provided a number of machines and driers with card payments.|Couldn’t recommend them more highly.

One of the best Tourist Parks in South Australia - the fragrance of Sea Salt Air gave us restful sleeps  and is an invigorating wake up call.
The Amenities and Kitchen are cleaned daily by a team of diligent housekeeping staff.
The Pedal Carts are our favourite park facility. With plenty of track to cover.

Stayed on powered site with water view. Loved the paved area provided as part of assigned site. Whole park was well laid out and very neat and tidy. Secured fence and security gates for easy access to beach. Electronic communication prior to arrival and after check in was excellent.
Had an amazing time,  amenities are great and a well kept place to stay and staff are super helpful and friendly. Definitely returning for another stay
Easy to get around camp kitchen is clean and easily accessible

Nice caravan park right next to Christies Beach. Easy walk to beach and restaurants.
We stayed 3 nights in one of their cabins and had a nice stay.

We had a great stay and the park was as expected with no issues at all and definitely 5 star review.

It's a smaller park with limited facilities for the younger ones but the location, large caravan sites and price far outweighs the cons.

Our greeting was also very friendly and helpful.
Very beautiful view. Worth visiting if coming to SA if you're a tourist, or just coming for a nice day out

Stayed last night for only 1 night. When my partner checked in, he double checked we had received the g’day discount as it’s pricey (happy to pay if it’s worth it!) and the condescending receptionist told him it’s the price we pay for the views. We were situated at the back of the park near the road and the views she was speaking about are of the residents onsite who were on drugs and could visibly see them doing drugs. One of them drove out the park, popped a car tyre speeding around and came back in causing a scene. Wandering around all night, arguing, off their faces and cars constantly driving past the caravan park blasting music and screaming meeting up with the residents. Amenities were clean and the site was big and nice grass so they deserve a star for that. What a shame for a great spot that has so much potential.  I wouldn’t recommend staying here. Or if you do, locking up all your valuables. Partner stayed up til midnight just to make sure we were safe.

Perfect location and tidy park. Staff leave the gates/boom gates open during business hours, this allows anyone to drive through the caravan park. I observed many people not staying at the park drive through. There is a few long term residents who are clearly under the influence. You need to keep everything locked up and cannot leave belongings outside your van eg chairs/tables. The screen doors on the cabins slam shut which is very annoying when people check in late at night and go in and out of the cabins unloading their car. The staff are friendly.

Great Campsite - Location is stunning and staff are lovely.
Trip very much marred by other site occupants. As we were camping we left a bag of goods in the site fridge overnight which was stolen, including a small cheese cake we bought for my mother for her birthday today from the Adelaide Markets. All was labelled and dated but this didn’t deter the thief. Disappointing and not the staffs fault, they were very apologetic. DO NOT USE THE KITCHEN FACILITY FRIDGES DUE TO THIS. Also, first time visiting from NZ and this, over multiple years of travelling and camping at campgrounds world wide, this has never happened to us. Disappointing, Australia.

This is a lovely park in a terrific location . Amenities are spotless . Close to shops  ,cafes
and  beautiful walks. Slab sites are double concrete which we loved and grassed sites are well tended and lush. This is our go to park when visiting family.
A great location and a well kept caravan park.

Great place to visit right on a beautiful beach good for walking the dogs exercise and people sometimes out having a surf when the weather is right I guess the park has friendly and very helpful staff good amenities and some lovely views looking over the sea I do recommend this place as a great place to visit even holidays with family I've been here 1 month so far and no problems at all oh and local shops near by so very convenient and not far to walk 👍👍
The toilet is very clean! The camping site is spacious and the staff is considerate
Amenities clean but the park is like staying in a prison camp
Nice place, couple of issues with doors to the cabin.
Great place to stay

We stayed on a powered site, very neat and clean, well maintained. Gates were very slow to open and close so just dont be in a rush to get in or out! It was a bit far away from CBD area but we made it work!
Great caravan sites with good amenities and just meters from beautiful Christies Beach.
Fantastic facilities very clean. Nice park plenty of space to relax. Great views

Amenities are clean, however require repairs and renovations with paint peeling off in female showers. $5 for a load of laundry, bring your own detergent. Basic camp kitchen and cute playground. Caravan sites are a good size with green grass, however price is steep for Amenities offered. Some loud neighbours at times arguing, can understand other reviews of people feeling this goes unchecked. Upon arriving staff stated that if I wanted to stay an extra night I'd have to move to another site when checking in, so I declined booking an extra night, stating I'd make other arrangements, turned out they'd charged me for the extra night regardless because 'a spot came up' and wouldn't offer a refund when discussed at front desk upon checkout. Overall this left me feeling that staff were unhelpful and not willing to fix this error they had made. Reception staff also did not apply g'day membership when queried did not refund or admit that this additional night stay was not communicated. This left me feeling like i wouldnt recommend a stay or come back especially given prices for off season $50+ a night. Location is convenient for beach access.
Right on the beach with amazing views . Close to shops and only about 30 mins drive to Maclaren Vale wineries

Cabin was fine all u need ,clean , everything in good condition and working , young man at reception was cheerful and helpful ,the location is so good 5 min Ur on the Beach and surf  club
10 min Ur at the Cafe and beach bar ,, for a small caravan park it is very good ,all amenities are great , 👍
Campingplatz und Sanitär ist okay
A lovely little park, close to eateries and pubs nestled on the beach edge.
We feel in Love with Adelaide because if this place.

I wish i could also a zero star rating.Husband had heart attack,  unfortunately, could not use our booking, could not get our deposit back,
Obviously these people have no 'heart'
Caravan experience was what was expected
Great spot, some caravan sites are a little tight. On the beach with some great views
Friendly happy staff plus meals are affordable and yummy!

We never got to go as driving from Melbourne. Partner was sick couldn't drive and the stuff at christies Beach wasn't nice enough or understandable to credit our money to welcome us back but yet they say sorry no refund or credit 😐
45 dollars l'emplacement avec électricité. Très propre, à côté de la mer, petit centre ville à 5 minutes de marche. Il y a un bon supermarché à moins de 5 minutes.

100 meters from the Beach, perfect spot!
To the beach via surveillance gate-code.
Shopping-center 3km driving.

Had a really bad experience here unfortunately. We were also kept up all night by yelling and people in tents fighting. We felt quite unsafe and left early. Despite, being a nice location and friendly staff - we wouldn’t stay again.

If only I could give this place zero stars.
There are a number of people living in tents who kept us awake all night - these people are clearly on drugs and yelled, fought and abused each other and other campers literally all night. This place is not worth $48 a night. Though it may seem a nice location, I did not feel comfortable or safe and left at first light. I will not be returning. I called the after hours number and was told they could not do anything.
Great location...but busy city park...no trees or privacy!
Best ever , have already recommended it to Victorian friends

The staff are very helpful. The sites are varied in size and shape, some with no grass, some with beach view. Camp kitchen has air fryers, fridge, bbqs etc, etc. Beautiful beach across the road. Part dog friendly. Not far up dog friendly all day.
great place loved the service
Beaut spot - smallish caravan park near the beach, 30km south of Adelaide.

When we got here there was no way to get in, we were locked out and had to get people to help us, when we got to our room we noticed that there was only one TV which was fine but when we went to watch a movie we noticed that the room we where in didn't work with the wifi, so none of us had wifi, we all so as a family went down to the beach only to find out they changed the pass code without telling us making all of us worry we wouldn't be able to get back into the facility, the only way we did was by asking someone what the code was, the stress was not worth the price
Great park. Well maintained and very central to everything. The best thing is being right on the beach. Highly recommend a visit to Christies Beach SA
Stayed here 2 times now me and my wife nice caravan park but noisy from the road traffic but other than that it's pleasant stay 5 stars
Great
Just an overnight stay. Well maintained sites. Clean amenities, good laundry. Excellent camp kitchen except for the grots who left it in a mess. Lovely staff. Met more people. Great spot all round 👍👍

We had a little family get away here. The Caravan’s location is very convenient, It’s close to shop and the beach. Pet- friendly. We had a blast  staying here. We didn’t have trouble to book. Camping sites are well taken cared off and we had NO trouble setting up our tent. Management are easy to communicate with and is very nice answering all our queries. Camper neighbours are nice too! Our little fur baby enjoyed staying here.

Stayed on the weekend with the family and the cabin we stayed in was really clean and had a great view of the beach, we picked this park because of the included portacot and the portacot did not disappoint.
Close to the beach, great mattress. Clean rooms ect.
Well priced, super friendly quiet park with beach access. Facilities are brilliant!

Very welcoming, easy fast check in. Very clean spaces and location next to the beach ⛱️ Recommend paid $39 P/N for a powered site for my few night Stey. But that can change depending on season ✅ definitely will Stey again if I come back to Adelaide. Thanks Everyone for a good Stey 🙌 even my greyhound loved it ✅

Love this park. Have returned after many years. Very neat, well managed. Just watch the fence on the entry, tricky when negotiating a sweeping left hand bend upon entry. Easy to take out the fence and damage your van if not careful. Keep to the right to be safe. The only reason they don't get a five star review.
Fantastic beach front camp ground. Very clean and accessible amenities. Will be coming back! Thank you
Great spot on the coast

We stayed a month at Christie’s Beach tourist park and could not fault it. The park staff were awesome at all times and the amenities were great. Couldn’t beat the location, would highly recommend this tourist park to everyone
